title: ChaoticWeather
description: Meteors, Chaos, and Loot – Let the Fun Begin!
body:
### # Note: Requires WorldEdit plugin to make the restriction method work! Donation - [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/ArthropodR)

## Description Transform your gameplay with ChaoticWeather, where thrilling weather events occur every 10-15 minutes. Experience the excitement of Meteor Impacts, Treasure Meteors, Hailstorms, Aurorastorms, Hurricane Winds, and Meteor Showers. Plus, during rain or thunderstorms, an extra good or bad effect will surprise you! ## Features Plug and Play: Simply download and place the .jar file in your plugins folder, and you're ready to go! Supported Languages: Spanish, Russian, French and English. ![Lannguage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77437e7d307a14361562f21bdbc59b07dbecf944.png) Random weather events every 10-15 minutes. ![Meteor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d07d210d610aab0007d8244d10ea9259bda15cc9.png) Special effects triggered by rain or thunderstorms. Adds chaos, fun, and unpredictability to your game. ![chaos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abc32ad9520d9df37e2e4c72ddae4e3da2d92943.png) All features are fully customizable through the config.yml file to suit your server’s needs. Easily reload the configuration file with the /chaoticweather reload command without restarting the server. ## Links [Wiki Page [Click Me]](https://github.com/ArthropodR/ChaoticWeather/wiki) [Events [Click Me]](https://github.com/ArthropodR/ChaoticWeather/wiki/Events) [Permissions [Click Me]](https://github.com/ArthropodR/ChaoticWeather/wiki/permissions) [Source Code [Click Me]](https://github.com/ArthropodR/ChaoticWeather/tree/master)
